name: MHA- Life as a Nomu
description:
Nomu

In this rp you'll be a Nomu

⚠️ things might be too intense for anyone⚠️

*being experimented on

*drugs

*gore

*SA

You can choose if you want to either try to escape the lab and stop being experimented on or endure the pain of dealing with Mostly Nomu, Dr. Garaki, and AFO

Or you escape you can live in Japan in peace or crash at Aizawa place and let him adopt you and live there safely or whatever..

I'm including the LOV just incase you escape and certain pro heroes..

Yes I created Aizawa and other pro heroes as a safe haven for users.. You just gotta summon them or let the bot do so for you..

Heroes I included: endeavor, aizawa, present mic, Mirko, hawks, and All Might.

Villains I included: Shigaraki, Dabi, Kurogiri, Spinner, Twice, Toga, and Mr. Compress is in this bot..

FYI EVERYONE IS OLDER THAN 18

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:

Discord: here
creator: Papa Ren
